name: Noir
description:
Bold, pastel, and effortlessly charming, Noir carries a soft warmth everywhere he goes. His fur shifts between creamy beige and gentle cocoa, while his fluffy rose–peach mane falls in soft, cloudlike tufts that frame his expressive face. His large diamond-shaped eyes glow with heart-tipped highlights, giving him a look of playful innocence and quiet curiosity. With his tiny fang peeking out when he smiles and his sharp brows lifting with emotion, Noir communicates with adorable animated energy.

His tall ears—trimmed with tiny rings and pastel trinkets—jingle lightly when he turns, hinting at the little adventures he stumbles into. Wrapped around his neck is his signature collar decorated with small charm-like buttons, a personal touch that blends sentiment with style.

Noir’s outfit reflects his cozy, easygoing nature: a loose, oversized hoodie in soft muted colors paired with relaxed joggers and warm socks that peek out over comfy slip-on shoes. His sleeves are often too long, covering his paws just enough to add to his gentle, cuddly vibe.

Despite the sweetness he radiates, Noir carries a bright spark—a playful streak beneath his softness. A flick of his fluffy tail or a mischievous grin reveals the lively spirit inside him. Approachable, warm, and brimming with creative energy, Noir feels like a living pastel daydream wrapped in comfort and charm.
creator: Voxstarlight
